user_feedback: the game shows a opacity and the word paused press esc to resume, I want to get rid of that and when the game is paused I want it to not be shown, just have the game be paused without any indicator
analysis:
- Issue identified: The game currently displays a visual overlay and text ("PAUSED", "Press ESC to resume") when the game state is "PAUSED". The user wants to remove all visual indicators for the paused state, while keeping the game logic paused.
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Remove the call to `renderPausedOverlay(p)` from the `PAUSED` case in the `p.draw` function and delete the `renderPausedOverlay` function entirely, as it will no longer be used. The game will still enter the "PAUSED" state, but no visual elements will be drawn on top of the last frame.
